title: IRGC hits oil tanker in Hormuz — 4 tankers attempted unauthorized transit, 1 struck and forced to halt, 3 turned back
snippet: IRGC said four oil tankers described as 'violators' attempted to leave the Strait of Hormuz without authorization and under US military direction. After repeated warnings, one tanker was targeted and forced to stop, three others turned back. This preceded the CENTCOM Goruk/Qeshm strikes and IRGC's retaliatory BM attack on Kuwait/Bahrain.
tag_reason: New incident — specific tanker attack in Hormuz on June 6
